subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, the Most Glorious, and my Master, the Most Exalted! With all the weakness that is characteristic of contingent beings and inherent in creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی الابهی و مولائی الاعلی انی بکل عجز هو من خصائص الامکان و لوازم الحدوث
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
